**word embeddings**.

EtH5pXBXYbA.title: Stop Downloading the Wrong AI Model
EtH5pXBXYbA.description_head:
Ever seen filenames like Q4_K_M or Q8_0 and had no idea what they mean?

I break down every letter and number in GGUF model filenames

tl;dr:
→ Q = quantized (compressed)
→ Number = bits per weight (Q4 = 4-bit, Q8 = 8-bit)
→ _K = k-quant (smarter mixed-precision compression)
→ _S / _M / _L = small / medium / large compression tier
→ _0 = legacy method (skip these)
→ Best picks: Q4_K_M or Q5_K_M

A
